content.title: New patcher improvements
content.message: This update fixes FPS desync on some devices and improves upload stability.

cards.title: FPS patch fix
cards.description: Audio no longer desyncs after ratio changes.

cards.title: Faster uploads
cards.description: Rebuilt sample tables load quicker on large files.
